content:
LIC offers two pure term plans: Tech Term for online buyers and Jeevan Amar for those buying through agents. They are very similar, but the differences matter.

Premium: Tech Term is 15 to 25% cheaper than Jeevan Amar for the same cover, because there is no agent commission built into the price. For a 35-year-old male non-smoker, a Rs 1 crore cover for 30 years costs approximately Rs 9,800/year on Tech Term vs Rs 12,500/year on Jeevan Amar.

Purchase method: Tech Term is purchased exclusively online at licindia.in. Jeevan Amar can be bought through any LIC agent, development officer, or branch.

Return of Premium variant: Both offer a ROP option where premiums are returned at end of term if you survive. This costs significantly more and reduces IRR — I generally recommend against it unless you are highly risk-averse.

My recommendation: If you are comfortable using the LIC portal, Tech Term saves you real money. For clients in Gorakhpur and eastern UP, I often recommend Jeevan Amar because I assist with the entire process — medical scheduling, form submission, nominee updates, and claim assistance at no extra cost. The Rs 2,700/year difference is worth paying for ongoing service.

Call me at 9415313434 to get exact premiums for your age.

Use our free [Premium Calculator](/calculators/premium) to calculate your own numbers.
contentHi:
प्रीमियम: टेक टर्म 15-25% सस्ता (कोई एजेंट कमीशन नहीं)। 35 वर्षीय के लिए Rs 1 करोड़, 30 वर्ष: टेक टर्म ~Rs 9,800 vs जीवन अमर ~Rs 12,500/वर्ष।

खरीद: टेक टर्म केवल licindia.in पर। जीवन अमर एजेंट या शाखा से।

मेरी सलाह: पोर्टल से सहज हों तो टेक टर्म बचत करता है। गोरखपुर ग्राहकों के लिए जीवन अमर — मेडिकल, फॉर्म और क्लेम में पूरी मदद। 9415313434 पर कॉल करें।
